name: Ginan Dev Container
postCreateCommand: sudo chown -R ubuntu:ubuntu /opt/vcpkg /home/ubuntu/.ccache 2>/dev/null || true && chmod 700 /home/ubuntu/.ssh && chmod 600 /home/ubuntu/.ssh/* 2>/dev/null || true && mkdir -p /home/ubuntu/.gnupg-local && chmod 700 /home/ubuntu/.gnupg-local && cp -r /home/ubuntu/.gnupg-host/* /home/ubuntu/.gnupg-local/ 2>/dev/null || true && chmod 600 /home/ubuntu/.gnupg-local/* 2>/dev/null || true && git config --global user.name 'Sebastien Allgeyer' && git config --global user.email 'sebastien.allgeyer@gmail.com' && git config --global user.signingkey 6CEABD6E543862F80B6E61E42AF527AE7996B8FE && git config --global commit.gpgsign true && git config --global gpg.program gpg && echo 'export GPG_TTY=\$(tty)' >> ~/.bashrc && echo 'export GNUPGHOME=\$HOME/.gnupg-local' >> ~/.bashrc && echo 'gpgconf --launch gpg-agent 2>/dev/null || true' >> ~/.bashrc
postStartCommand: bash -c 'export GPG_TTY=$(tty); export GNUPGHOME=$HOME/.gnupg-local; mkdir -p ~/.gnupg-local; echo "pinentry-program /usr/bin/pinentry-curses" > ~/.gnupg-local/gpg-agent.conf; echo "allow-loopback-pinentry" >> ~/.gnupg-local/gpg-agent.conf; gpgconf --kill gpg-agent 2>/dev/null || true; gpgconf --launch gpg-agent'
